error.signature: Error: Client closed connection - output buffer limit exceeded

verdict.summary: Redis closed client connection because output buffer exceeded configured limit.

dead_ends.action: Set output buffer limits to unlimited
dead_ends.why_fails: Slow clients can cause Redis to use unbounded memory and OOM.

dead_ends.action: Increase server RAM without fixing slow client
dead_ends.why_fails: Slow client will eventually fill any amount of RAM.

workarounds.action: Fix slow client: consume responses faster or reduce subscription scope
workarounds.how: Process pub/sub messages in separate thread; reduce SUBSCRIBE patterns

workarounds.action: Tune client-output-buffer-limit for specific client types
